GETAWAY
The Anniversary Issue  ·  October 8–12, 2026
celebrating year nº 19

Play
with me!?

Sintra, Portugal — four days of ocean golf, Michelin stars & old-vine wine, for two.

36 holes above the Atlantic Two Michelin-starred dinners One 14th-century palace hotel Zero children
A note from the publisher

Carrie 19 years this October, can you believe it I found us four days in Sintra Golf for me, stars for both of us, a driver on the wine day You just pack play with me!? :-)

— M.
Oct 8–12Thu night → Mon, home by dinner
NonstopDelta · JFK ⇄ Lisbon · ~6h 50m
3 nightsPenha Longa · a Ritz-Carlton estate
★ + ★LAB by Sergi Arola · Midori
Oct 13Land Monday · anniversary dinner in NYC
The address

A monastery in the pines, thirty minutes from the plane

Penha Longa Resort — a Ritz-Carlton, built around a 14th-century monastery inside Sintra-Cascais Natural Park. Championship golf on the grounds, a serious spa, and two of Portugal’s Michelin-starred dining rooms in the same building where we sleep. UNESCO-listed Sintra is up the hill; the Cascais coast is down the other side.

October on this coast: low 70s, Atlantic light, summer crowds gone.

The itinerary — the short version

Four days, no alarm clocks that matter

Friday · Oct 9

The soft landing

Wheels down at 8am. The only job today is arriving well.

  • Espresso on the monastery terrace, bags dropped
  • Seafood lunch on the Cascais marina, then a proper nap
  • Dinner at LAB by Sergi Arola ★ Michelin, downstairs
Saturday · Oct 10

Golf & grapes

The main event: a world top-100 course, then a family quinta.

  • Morning round at Oitavos Dunes — Arthur Hills links through the dunes, ocean on the horizon
  • Private cellar tour & tasting at Quinta de Chocapalha, driver booked so we both taste
  • Dinner at Midori ★ Michelin — Japanese technique, Portuguese larder
Sunday · Oct 11

The Silver Coast

One drive north, one unforgettable clifftop course, then nothing at all.

  • Morning at West Cliffs — “World’s Best New Course” when it opened, holes hanging over the ocean
  • Afternoon: spa, pool, or nine lazy holes on the estate
  • Candlelit petiscos & vinho in Cascais old town
Monday · Oct 12

The encore

Columbus Day works for us.

  • Slow breakfast, one last walk of the grounds
  • Late-morning nonstop, land JFK mid-afternoon
  • Tuesday Oct 13: our actual 19th — dinner in New York, unpacked and smug

“Home the night before the anniversary, with the anniversary already won.”

The scorecard

Rated, starred & linked

LAB by Sergi Arola Friday dinner — inventive tasting menus, 550-bottle cellar ★ Michelin Guide ↗

Midori Saturday dinner — Portugal’s first starred Japanese room ★ Michelin Guide ↗
West Cliffs Sunday golf — Cynthia Dye clifftop design, Silver Coast Best New World, 2017 Visit ↗

2★Michelin, one weekend

The fine print

Already thought through

Flights
Delta nonstops both ways: out of JFK Thursday evening (lands ~8am), home late morning Monday — mid-afternoon at JFK, dinner at home.
Getting around
Driver booked for all of Saturday (golf → lunch → winery → home). No one skips the tasting.
The children
Toby & Nate covered before wheels-up; Molly’s at school. Four days, one house, zero drama — that’s the plan being arranged.
The anniversary itself
Tuesday Oct 13, back in New York: dinner for two, nineteen years in. Restaurant nominations welcome.

GETAWAY · The Anniversary Issue · Published July 2026 · An edition of one, for an audience of one.

Itinerary subject to approval by the editor-in-chief. She knows who she is.
